title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click. It automates both control plane and data plane management while allowing teams to customize configurations when needed. The service integrates cost optimization and auto-scaling via Karpenter node pools, with built-in support for AI workloads including inference and training scenarios.
